description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a marbled, tan-and-white pattern on its exterior, giving it a distinctive and stylish appearance. The bag is equipped with two types of straps: a short, rounded handle for hand carrying and a longer, detachable shoulder strap for versatility. The main compartment appears to be secured with a zipper running along the top, and the zipper pull is visible in some views. The sides of the bag are reinforced with black material, which matches the straps and adds contrast to the lighter body. There are no visible brand logos or decorative embellishments, keeping the design clean and modern. The overall construction suggests a soft, flexible body with semi-rigid reinforcement at the base and sides.
description: A rectangular handbag with a marbled tan-and-white pattern, black straps, and a top zipper closure. The design is clean, modern, and versatile for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the slim profile, the rounded handle, and the long shoulder strap hanging to the side.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the marbled pattern, both the short handle and the long strap, and the zipper closure at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the long strap visible and the zipper pull slightly more prominent.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the marbled pattern, both straps, and the clean, uninterrupted back panel.
attribute_strap_type: One short rounded handle for hand carrying and one long, detachable shoulder strap for crossbody or shoulder use; both attached with metal hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top of the bag, with a visible zipper pull.
